reasoning: To address your primary limiter of poor lactate clearance, this session will build your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed a comfortable endurance effort; we need to ante up with structured intervals that reflect demands similar to the Alpine Loop's climb. This focus is essential to enhancing your sustained power output.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (8 min over at 242-256W, 4 min under at 201-218W) with 2 min recovery spin between each set

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
